titleStmt.title: SII 40.306: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 306. (A.R. No. B. 351 of 1933.) Bondalakuṇṭa, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the Rāmasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Bhādrapada, ba. 30.

Damaged. Records the gift of the Viramushṭi-Pannu of several countries made to the god Vīrēśvara of Bondalakuṇṭa in Ganḍikōṭa-sīma for conducting special services on the occasion of Śivaratri by Śivayōgi-Liṅgayya, Mōtuvīrayya Naṅchāyya and Vīrappa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
va¨rṣaṁbulu 1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara bhā
drapada ba 30 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapra
tāpaśrīvīrasadāsivarāya mahārāyalu vidyānagara paṭṭaṇama
ṁddu vajra siṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthvīrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrīśaila
mallikā¨rjunadēvuni kāryaka¨rtalaina yyavāri muḍulanu vuḍivimā
bhyamaina dēvaradēśāla Ānatini svasti veṁkkamāḷikāpraśastasahitulaIna
śrīmadgaṇēśvaradēvara gavuriśvaradēvara divya śrīpādapadmārādhakulaIna mulkināṁṭi
saḷamukhyamaina cālu mūla samasta pikkaṁḍṟla Ānatininni śivayōgi liṁgayya
rudramōtu vīrayyanu Avagaḍavirayya koḍuku naṁcāyyanu voṁṭapūri
nnu vīrappānunnu gaṁḍḍikōṭa sīmalōni boṁḍḍalakuṁṭa vīrēśvaruniki dhāravōsi
dalakuṁṭṭanu cellivace vīramuṣṭi paṁnnu jaṁjyā vēsina sakalapurāṁttaku
puṇyaṁgānu paramaguruvulaku puṇyaṁgānu boṁḍḍalakuṁṭa vīrēśvaruniki
trivācakaṁgānu trikaraṇaśuddhigānu dhāravosiyistiṁ yiṁddulu
rūkala lekha śivarātri śāvaku vīramuṣṭhi pannu Accevāralānu yiyyaṁgalavāru
vīramuṣṭilu ganaka tappinānu gaṁgakarata gobrāṁhmala vadhiṁccina pāpānā
bōduru paradēśālakunnu kulācā rasēvācāra vibhūti rudrākṣaku velija
Ēye vīramuṣṭhi tappinānu mahattununnu paramaguruvulakunnu vadhi
yiccina dhamma śilāśāsanaṁ . Ahō rāghavarājēṁdra sasta kalyānujīvanu
rviṇī dattāpahārini svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ śrīkrimi yanu .
Digital edition of SII 40.306 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
